# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-mesh
spec:
  tracing:
    jaeger: {}
  certificates:
    caCertificate: <BASE64_ENCODED_CA_CERT>
  kubernetes:
    serviceAccount: linkerd-sa

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-mesh-policy
spec:
  policy: |
    {
      "version": "v1",
      "rules": [
        {
          "allow": [
            {
              "from": ["*"],
              "to": ["service1"],
              "ports": ["80"]
            },
            {
              "from": ["service2"],
              "to": ["service3"],
              "ports": ["443"]
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-sa
secrets:
- name: linkerd
  strings:
    tls.key: <BASE64_ENCODED_PRIVATE_KEY>
    tls.cert: <BASE64_ENCODED_LINKERD_CERT>
